mapper.sql: id , user_id, transaction_number, actual_amount, amount, rate_amount, payment_status, rate_info, payment_address, receiving_address, customer_user_name,customer_uid,customer_user_id,is_interior, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, is_deleted
mapper.select:
select
from t_payment_transaction where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0

select
from t_payment_transaction where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
select count(1) from t_payment_transaction where is_deleted = 0 and user_id = #{userId} order by create_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into t_payment_transaction (id, user_id, transaction_number, actual_amount, amount, rate_amount, payment_status, payment_address, receiving_address, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, is_deleted, rate_info) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{transactionNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{actualAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{amount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{rateAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{paymentStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{paymentAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{receivingAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isDeleted,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{rateInfo,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR})

mapper.update: update t_payment_transaction set user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, transaction_number = #{transactionNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, actual_amount = #{actualAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, amount = #{amount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, rate_amount = #{rateAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, payment_status = #{paymentStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, payment_address = #{paymentAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, receiving_address = #{receivingAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, is_deleted = #{isDeleted,jdbcType=INTEGER} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update t_payment_transaction
user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
transaction_number = #{transactionNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
actual_amount = #{actualAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
amount = #{amount,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
rate_amount = #{rateAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
payment_status = #{paymentStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER},
payment_address = #{paymentAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
receiving_address = #{receivingAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
is_deleted = #{isDeleted,jdbcType=INTEGER},
rate_info = #{rateInfo,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
